description: Leboncoin is a French online classifieds marketplace for buying, selling, rentals, jobs, vehicles, and property listings. The bon-coin.net domain appears to host an OpenAI app/MCP endpoint related to that service.
summary: bon-coin.net exposes a known OAuth-protected MCP server at https://openaiapp.bon-coin.net/api/openaiapp/v1/mcp/http; no other public developer surfaces were found.
